title: valerianoides integrifolia
intro: Valerianoides integrifolia is a plant species in the family Valerianaceae, commonly known as the whole-leaf valerian or entire-leaf valerian. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its sedative and anti-anxiety effects, which are attributed to its essential oil and alkaloid content. The health benefits of Valerianoides integrifolia include improved sleep quality, reduced stress and anxiety, and relief from muscle and joint pain. Valerian root preparations are commonly used in herbal medicine, available in the form of teas, tinctures, capsules, and supplements, which can be used to promote relaxation and reduce symptoms of insomnia and restlessness.
